COMMENT@0:66 "# TODO: move these cases back to ok/0004_string_value.graphql when"
WHITESPACE@66:67 "\n"
COMMENT@67:144 "# https://github.com/oxc-project/oxc-graphql-parser/issues/657 is implemented"
WHITESPACE@144:145 "\n"
ERROR@145:201 "surrogate code point is invalid in unicode escape sequence (paired surrogate not supported yet: https://github.com/oxc-project/oxc-graphql-parser/issues/657)" "string with unicode surrogate pair escape \uD83D\uDE00"
WHITESPACE@201:202 "\n"
ERROR@202:258 "surrogate code point is invalid in unicode escape sequence (paired surrogate not supported yet: https://github.com/oxc-project/oxc-graphql-parser/issues/657)" "string with minimal surrogate pair escape \uD800\uDC00"
WHITESPACE@258:259 "\n"
ERROR@259:315 "surrogate code point is invalid in unicode escape sequence (paired surrogate not supported yet: https://github.com/oxc-project/oxc-graphql-parser/issues/657)" "string with maximal surrogate pair escape \uDBFF\uDFFF"
WHITESPACE@315:317 "\n\n"
COMMENT@317:402 "# TODO: emit two errors: https://github.com/oxc-project/oxc-graphql-parser/issues/319"
WHITESPACE@402:403 "\n"
ERROR@403:429 "surrogate code point is invalid in unicode escape sequence (paired surrogate not supported yet: https://github.com/oxc-project/oxc-graphql-parser/issues/657)" "split pair \uD83D \uDE00"
WHITESPACE@429:431 "\n\n"
ERROR@431:460 "surrogate code point is invalid in unicode escape sequence (paired surrogate not supported yet: https://github.com/oxc-project/oxc-graphql-parser/issues/657)" "Backwards pair \uDE00\uD83D"
WHITESPACE@460:461 "\n"
ERROR@461:489 "surrogate code point is invalid in unicode escape sequence (paired surrogate not supported yet: https://github.com/oxc-project/oxc-graphql-parser/issues/657)" "Lone lead surrogate \uD83E"
WHITESPACE@489:490 "\n"
ERROR@490:519 "surrogate code point is invalid in unicode escape sequence (paired surrogate not supported yet: https://github.com/oxc-project/oxc-graphql-parser/issues/657)" "Lone trail surrogate \uDD80"
WHITESPACE@519:520 "\n"
EOF@520:520
